message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "Project Manager" as PM

participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as UI
participant "AGVServer" as AGVServer
participant "AGVServerThread" as AGVServerThread
participant "AVGManagerController" as AVGManagerController
participant "AGVDigitalTwinServer" as AGVDigitalTwinServer
participant "AGVDigitalTwinThread" as AGVDigitalTwinThread
participant "AGVDigitalTwinController" as AGVDigitalTwinController
participant "CodingAndDecoding2" as CodingAndDecoding2

PM -> UI : Wants to assign ready to go Orders to an AGV

UI -> AGVServer : message
AGVServer -> AGVServer : accept
AGVServer -> AGVServerThread : start

AGVServerThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 : Decoding(r)
AGVServerThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 : Message
AGVServerThread -> AVGManagerController : FifoAGV()
AVGManagerController -> AVGManagerController : findavailableOrder()

loop [until orderList is empty]
    AVGManagerController -> AVGManagerController : findavailableAGV(weight,volume)
    AVGManagerController -> AVGManagerController : createTaskandSave(description,order,agv)
    AVGManagerController -> AVGManagerController : doTask()
    AVGManagerController -> AGVDigitalTwinServer : message
    AGVDigitalTwinServer -> AGVDigitalTwinServer : accept
    AGVDigitalTwinServer -> AGVDigitalTwinThread : start
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 : Decoding(r)
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> CodingAndDecoding2 : message
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> AGVDigitalTwinController : doTask(taskPerform)
    AGVDigitalTwinController -> AGVDigitalTwinThread : TaskReportMessage
    AGVDigitalTwinThread -> AGVDigitalTwinServer : TaskReportMessage
    AGVDigitalTwinServer -> AVGManagerController : TaskReportMessage
end

AVGManagerController -> AGVServerThread : ResponseMessage
AGVServerThread -> AGVServer : ResponseMessage
AGVServer -> UI : ResponseMessage

UI -> PM : Informs operation success

@enduml
```
